description_long: This is a two-tone baseball cap featuring a dark navy blue front panel and bill, contrasted with beige mesh side and back panels. The front and bill are made of a solid fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with visible white stitching outlining the bill and crown seams. The back of the cap is constructed from a breathable mesh material, providing ventilation and comfort for the wearer. An adjustable plastic snapback closure is present at the rear, allowing for size customization. The cap has a classic six-panel construction with a fabric-covered button at the crown's apex. There are no visible logos, patches, or decorative elements on the exterior.
description: A navy blue and beige mesh baseball cap with white stitching and an adjustable snapback closure. The cap features a solid fabric front and bill, with ventilated mesh panels at the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the navy blue fabric front panel and bill with prominent white stitching.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the transition from the navy blue front to the beige mesh side panel and the curved bill.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the beige mesh back panels and the adjustable snapback closure.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing both the mesh back and the navy blue front, emphasizing the cap's two-tone design.
attribute_brim_style: curved, medium-width brim with visible stitching
attribute_crown_shape: rounded six-panel crown with a fabric-covered button
